summary: Post-cleanup verification for the nonterminal Lean LCA source tree. The checks preserve the Lean frontier and confirm that repository noise was removed without changing root Lean project files.

commands.evidence: Completed successfully with 2936 jobs after lake exe cache get; existing style warnings only.
Reported no forbidden Lean tokens under LeanLCAExactChallenge.

commands.evidence: Both audit scripts compiled in memory without creating __pycache__.
Post-metadata whitespace check completed before final commit.
No Japanese or CJK text remains outside ignored build and manifest paths.
No root worker, packet, progress, manifest, issue queue, proof frontier, or scratch-report artifacts remain.
